en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Colombia Occupational Health and Safety Management SG-SST documentation in the Colombia Occupational Health and Safety Management System SG-SST Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Colombia Occupational Health and Safety Management System SG-SST Policy

The SG-SST Policy is a formal expression of a company's commitment to occupational health and safety, created by the company itself. It sets the guiding principles for risk prevention and continuous improvement, signed by top management, and communicated to all employees.

Sample Document Colombia Resolution 0312 Colombia Decree 1072

The SG-SST Policy requires an annual formal review and update. While the policy technically remains valid until formally superseded, Colombian regulations generally require companies to review and, if necessary, update their SG-SST policy every year or whenever major changes occur in the organization's activities, processes, or risk profile.
